---
title: "CV"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
date: 28/06/2026
---

<!--
  TWO OPTIONS for your CV:
  A) Keep it here as a Quarto page (easy to update, always in sync with your site)
  B) Embed a PDF (looks polished, matches what you send to recruiters)

  For option B, uncomment the block below and comment out the rest:
-->
```{=html}
<iframe src="assets/cv/cv-suyash-naik.pdf" width="150%" height="1000px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
<p><a href="assets/cv/cv-suyash-naik.pdf" download>⬇ Download PDF</a></p>
```


<a href="assets/cv/cv-suyash-naik.pdf" class="btn-outline" download>⬇ Download PDF</a>

<!--
## Education

**PhD in Biophysics / Developmental Biology** · 2020 – present
Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA), Klosterneuburg
Supervisors: Prof. Carl-Philipp Heisenberg & Dr. Edouard Hannezo

**BSc / MSc** · *(add your undergraduate institution and degree)*

---

## Research experience

**PhD researcher** · Heisenberg & Hannezo Labs, ISTA · 2020 – present

- *(bullet: one crisp sentence per key contribution — quantify where you can)*
- *(bullet)*
- *(bullet)*

---

## Skills

| Category | Tools / methods |
|---|---|
| Programming | Python, R, MATLAB, Bash |
| Data & analysis | pandas, scikit-learn, ggplot2, napari, Fiji |
| Imaging | Confocal, lightsheet, laser ablation |
| Modelling | Continuum mechanics, agent-based models |
| Reproducibility | Git, GitLab CI, Quarto, Docker |
| Communication | Science writing, data visualisation, public outreach |

---

## Publications & preprints

- **Naik S**, et al. (year). *Title*. *Journal*. [DOI](#)

*(Add as you publish — preprints count, list them clearly labelled)*

---

## Selected talks & posters

- *(Conference name, year — "Title of talk/poster")*

---

## Other

**PhDBalance social media co-ordinator** · using design and communication to support mental health in academia

**Interests:** developmental biophysics, science policy, data storytelling, illustration
-->
